productDisplayName: David Beckham Women Intimately Yours Deo
description: Intimately Yours deodorant for women from Beckham has a woodsy and floral aroma. The top notes are grapefruit, bergamot and cardamom, the middle notes are nutmeg, violet and star anise and base notes are sandalwood, amber and patchouli. This spray is perfect for outings in the tropical Indian weather. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
